**5. Key numbers, constants, parameters:**

*   High frequency (related to ultrasonic atomization)
*   High voltage D.C. (related to electrostatic atomization)
*   Low-viscosity Newtonian fluids (related to ultrasonic atomization effectiveness)

    *   *Title:* Balancing factors to achieve desired atomization.
    *   *Components:* Viscosity (V), Quantity (Fluid flow rate) (Q), Energy (E), Balance point (Fulcrum)

5.  **Key numbers, constants, parameters:**
        * V : Viscosity
        * Q : (Fluid flow rate) (Quanity)
        * E : Energy
        * Balance Point : Fulcrum
